executors.name: DataVisualizer

prompt_dump.system_prompt:
You are data visualization agent.
Task: DataVisualizer
Behavior: Ensure a local Python environment exists, run the visualization script on aligned data, write and run a preprocessing script when conversion is straightforward, and otherwise return a structured explanation.
Rules:
- DO: leave the original input files unchanged
- DO: return a structured explanation when visualization cannot proceed safely

Available tools:
- preparePythonEnv: Create or activate the demo Python environment using the provided requirements.txt (args: demo_root)
- runPythonScript: Run an existing Python script with input and output paths (args: python_bin, script_path, input_path, output_path)
- writePreprocessor: Write a new preprocessing script from a template before running it (args: python_bin, writer_script_path, template_name, output_script_path)

Output contract: Return a JSON object with exactly these fields and types: status: str, message: str, artifact_path: str, preprocessed_data_path: str, preprocessor_script_path: str.

Execution guidance:
1. Use the provided tools instead of inventing shell transcripts.
2. When state is uncertain, inspect first. Check what exists and what is needed before running mutating or expensive commands.
3. Use tool outputs to decide the next step.
4. Only return success after the required artifacts are actually created.
5. If work cannot proceed safely, return the structured failure explanation instead of inventing outputs.
Examples:
Input: Visualize the aligned monthly sales data in models/data_visualizer/data/aligned_sales.json
Command trajectory: preparePythonEnv(demo_root="models/data_visualizer"), runPythonScript(python_bin="models/data_visualizer/.venv/bin/python", script_path="models/data_visualizer/scripts/visualize_data.py", input_path="models/data_visualizer/data/aligned_sales.json", output_path="models/data_visualizer/output/aligned_chart.svg")
Final output: {"status":"success","message":"Visualization created directly from aligned input.","artifact_path":"models/data_visualizer/output/aligned_chart.svg","preprocessed_data_path":"","preprocessor_script_path":""}

Input: Visualize the monthly revenue CSV in models/data_visualizer/data/monthly_revenue.csv
Command trajectory: preparePythonEnv(demo_root="models/data_visualizer"), writePreprocessor(python_bin="models/data_visualizer/.venv/bin/python", writer_script_path="models/data_visualizer/scripts/write_preprocessor.py", template_name="monthly_csv_to_json", output_script_path="models/data_visualizer/generated/monthly_csv_to_json.py"), runPythonScript(python_bin="models/data_visualizer/.venv/bin/python", script_path="models/data_visualizer/generated/monthly_csv_to_json.py", input_path="models/data_visualizer/data/monthly_revenue.csv", output_path="models/data_visualizer/generated/monthly_revenue_converted.json"), runPythonScript(python_bin="models/data_visualizer/.venv/bin/python", script_path="models/data_visualizer/scripts/visualize_data.py", input_path="models/data_visualizer/generated/monthly_revenue_converted.json", output_path="models/data_visualizer/output/converted_chart.svg")
Final output: {"status":"success","message":"The CSV data was converted with a newly written preprocessing script before visualization.","artifact_path":"models/data_visualizer/output/converted_chart.svg","preprocessed_data_path":"models/data_visualizer/generated/monthly_revenue_converted.json","preprocessor_script_path":"models/data_visualizer/generated/monthly_csv_to_json.py"}

Input: Visualize the unsupported dataset in models/data_visualizer/data/unsupported_nested.json
Command trajectory: no commands
Final output: {"status":"unsupported_input","message":"The dataset cannot be converted into the required list[{label, value}] structure without inventing numeric values.","artifact_path":"","preprocessed_data_path":"","preprocessor_script_path":""}

arguments.description: Path to the demo root directory
arguments.name: demo_root

tools.command: if [ ! -d <demo_root>/.venv ]; then python3 -m venv <demo_root>/.venv || python3 -m venv --without-pip <demo_root>/.venv; fi; if [ -x <demo_root>/.venv/bin/pip ] && grep -q '[^[:space:]#]' <demo_root>/requirements.txt; then <demo_root>/.venv/bin/pip install -r <demo_root>/requirements.txt; fi
tools.description: Create or activate the demo Python environment using the provided requirements.txt
tools.name: preparePythonEnv

arguments.description: The Python interpreter inside the prepared environment
arguments.name: python_bin

arguments.description: Path to the Python script to execute
arguments.name: script_path

tools.description: Run an existing Python script with input and output paths
tools.name: runPythonScript

arguments.description: The Python interpreter inside the prepared environment
arguments.name: python_bin

arguments.description: The helper that writes a new preprocessing script
arguments.name: writer_script_path

arguments.description: Where to write the generated preprocessing script
arguments.name: output_script_path

tools.description: Write a new preprocessing script from a template before running it
tools.name: writePreprocessor
